title: Conduct manual fumigation of vertebrate and invertebrate pests
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct manual fumigation of vertebrate and invertebrate pests demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine type and method of fumigation

pcs.text: Identify the pest characteristics and degree of infestation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the pest characteristics and degree of infestation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the pest characteristics and degree of infestation.

pcs.text: Assess the infestation and determine threshold for fumigant treatment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the infestation and determine threshold for fumigant treatment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the infestation and determine threshold for fumigant treatment.

pcs.text: Identify fumigant treatment options for vertebrate and invertebrate pests
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify fumigant treatment options for vertebrate and invertebrate pests?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify fumigant treatment options for vertebrate and invertebrate pests.

pcs.text: Identify and select fumigant and its application rate according to chemical label and pest to be controlled
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select fumigant and its application rate according to chemical label and pest to be controlled?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select fumigant and its application rate according to chemical label and pest to be controlled.

pcs.text: Identify hazards, assess risks and implement control measures for pest fumigation activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards, assess risks and implement control measures for pest fumigation activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, assess risks and implement control measures for pest fumigation activities.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine type and method of fumigation

elements.title: Prepare to use fumigant according to label and safety data sheets (SDS)

pcs.text: Identify, select, fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE) according to chemical label instructions and workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, select, fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE) according to chemical label instructions and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify and calculate application rates for fumigation conditions according to chemical label instructions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and calculate application rates for fumigation conditions according to chemical label instructions.

pcs.text: Prepare hazard exclusion barriers, signage and emergency response procedure according to health and safety in the workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare hazard exclusion barriers, signage and emergency response procedure according to health and safety in the workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare hazard exclusion barriers, signage and emergency response procedure according to health and safety in the workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, assess risks and implement control measures according to health and safety in the workplace procedures.
